text: [PINNED May 11] Kintampo coverage update - hitting 71.0 percent this week. Great progress on the last catch-up campaign.
Team - Amendment 4 rolling out. Coverage figures will need re-verification per site.
Agreed. Fritz - can you coordinate the reconciliation pass?
On it. Will pull from Dropbox pipeline and cross-check against Salesforce sign-off per site.
Kintampo Amendment 4 delivery closed. Coverage locked at 68.4 percent. Note this supersedes the May figure.
Kilifi - pipeline shows 815 encounters this window. Partner sign-off shows 782. Investigating.
@fritz thoughts? Delta of 33 doses.
Two possibilities. Sign-off lag or pipeline double-count on July 3 batch. Not forcing verdict. Presenting as range at IDWeek.
Fritz - can we get the Kintampo coverage locked before you leave for DC? Confluence still shows 62 percent which contradicts Jira.
Working through it. Jira 68.4 is the authoritative figure. Confluence page is stale from July.
NIAID summary statement came through. Fritz - draft the memo and we walk through at IDWeek Oct 16.
On it. Draft this weekend. No preview to blog or LinkedIn until you sign off.
Do we need Bagamoyo PI added as co-I for the revision? Cover letter of record already has her but the Notion planning page is stale.
Submitted cover letter is authoritative. Notion page is a January draft, missing Bagamoyo. Will fix Notion.
Sanity check - Airtable manuscript pipeline row 17 says 4127 encounters. Dropbox pipeline says 4382. Which do we use?
Dropbox. Airtable row is August snapshot, stale. Will update Airtable this week.
Reminder - Fellow Research Day Wed Oct 8. Preliminary read only. IDWeek poster + short talk Oct 15-19. Grand Rounds Oct 22.
Good. Same figure set across all three?
Yes. Reconciled numbers packet locks the figures. No same-site drift across audiences.
Fritz - confirmed Oct 16 overnight call cover. You cover Nov 3.
Confirmed. Thanks Janet.
Study material shipment received today. FedEx 8034-7521-4210. All accounted for.
IDWeek dinner Oct 17 - Old Ebbitt Grill. Booked. See you all.
Quick note - Kintampo data received today, will pull to Dropbox by EOD.
Weekly numbers check-in - Kilifi at expected coverage, no red flags.
Field coordinator ping - Manhica logistics look good.
Reminder - RTS-S implementation working group meets Thursdays at 4 PM Eastern.
Uploading fresh CSV to Dropbox from Bagamoyo pipeline.
Reviewed the Kintampo cohort last night. No surprises.
Quick heads-up - Kilifi field site had a power outage yesterday, cold chain intact per site coord.
Manuscript figure 3 v6 uploaded to shared Drive.
Grant deadline update - internal review pass done, waiting on Kevin.
Confluence page cleanup pass - archived 8 stale pages from 2024.
New study coordinator onboarding at Kintampo site starts next week.
IRB annual review packet drafted, ready for co-PI signatures.
Weekly WhatsApp digest from field team - all sites reporting normal operations.
Zotero library synced - added 12 new implementation science refs.
Reminder - please tag reconciled numbers packet references in R link snippets.
Great share Kevin, thanks for the analysis notes.
Same page. Will add this to the manuscript revision list.
Confirming receipt of the updated field protocol PDF.
Team - I will be on leave Thursday afternoon, back Friday morning.
Meeting notes from yesterday attached in Confluence.
Thanks for the quick turnaround.
Agreed - lets keep the open-conclusion posture on Kilifi until we have clean data.
Reminder to log CME credits before end of month.
Reference chase update - the Zhang 2024 preprint is now on Zotero.
Field team hire confirmed at Bagamoyo - starts October 20.
